sections.section_purpose: To provide detailed pricing information as required by the tender.
sections.response_guidance: Complete the pricing schedule as specified in the tender. Include pricing on the basis of Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M, Time and Materials, and any combination thereof. Reference annexes where required.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the commercial terms and conditions of the proposal.
sections.response_guidance: State acceptance of, or proposed deviations from, the draft contract terms. Include a draft AIC Schedule and describe the approach to maximizing Australian Industry participation.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the project management methodology and governance structure.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the project management methodology, governance structure, and reporting approach. Include details on performance management, meeting schedules, and reporting requirements.

sections.section_purpose: To outline the approach to transitioning services in and out.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the approach to transition-in and, if applicable, transition-out. Include plans such as Transition-In Plan, Phase-Out Plan, and others as specified.

sections.section_purpose: To provide a description of the proposed solution architecture.
sections.response_guidance: Provide a description of the proposed solution architecture, including diagrams where appropriate. Include plans such as the Test Plan and others as specified.

sections.section_purpose: To describe the security framework and controls relevant to the engagement.
sections.response_guidance: Describe the security framework, controls, and certifications relevant to this engagement. Include confidentiality requirements and physical security arrangements.

sections.section_purpose: To demonstrate relevant experience and past performance.
sections.response_guidance: Provide two or more case studies demonstrating relevant experience. Highlight methodology, past performance, and technical merit.

sections.section_purpose: To list proposed key personnel and their qualifications.
sections.response_guidance: List proposed key personnel with roles, qualifications, and relevant experience. Ensure compliance with legal requirements regarding employee entitlements and gender equality.
